creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
An update of the void-zones list today breaks the local-void.zones file and therefore the void-zones-tools:

[...]
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44041: error: stray '"'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44041: error: stray '"'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44041: error: unknown keyword 'static'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44177: error: local-zone type: expected static, deny, refuse, redirect, transparent, typetransparent, inform, inform_deny, always_transparent, always_refuse, always_nxdomain or nodefault
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44177: error: stray '"'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44177: error: stray '"'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44177: error: unknown keyword 'static'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44612: error: local-zone type: expected static, deny, refuse, redirect, transparent, typetransparent, inform, inform_deny, always_transparent, always_refuse, always_nxdomain or nodefault
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44612: error: stray '"'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44612: error: stray '"'
/var/unbound/local-void.zones:44612: error: unknown keyword 'static'
read /var/unbound/unbound.conf failed: 480 errors in configuration file
[1540494262] unbound[16847:0] fatal error: Could not read config file: /var/unbound/unbound.conf
/etc/rc.d/local_unbound: WARNING: failed to start local_unbound
[...]

Restoring an older /var/unbound/local-void.zones file from backup solves the problem, but running /usr/local/bin/void-zones-tools.sh breaks it again.
